design_philosophy: Institutional, high-conviction, raw data, low-latency feel. We use the 'Control Room Grid' mode to optimize every pixel for data. Aesthetics derive from tactical minimalism and absolute precision. No soft shadows, no muddy gradients.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Hard contrast shifts, no soft transitions (e.g., hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-white).

components.cards: Flat background bg-[#0C0C0C], 1px subtle border (#1F1F1F), no shadow. rounded-none. Internal padding p-4 or p-6.
components.buttons: Square edges. Primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1F1F1F] text-white hover:border-zinc-500. Tags: Use solid border with 10% opacity background of the accent color.
components.tables: Dense, monospace numbers, right-aligned data, subtle bottom borders border-[#1F1F1F]. Hover row highlights bg-[#111111].
components.charts: Recharts. Monotone lines or step-charts. No soft curves. Use brand accents for lines. Hidden grid lines or extremely faint (opacity 0.05). Tooltips must have dark background and sharp borders.
components.sheet_deep_dive: Use Shadcn Sheet. Right-side slide-over. Width 90vw on mobile, 40vw on desktop. Heavy backdrop blur (backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/60) with 1px border-l border-white/10.
components.badges: Sharp, uppercase. Example: Gainer (text-[#00E676] border-[#00E676]/30 bg-[#00E676]/10). Quitter (text-[#FF3D00] border-[#FF3D00]/30 bg-[#FF3D00]/10).

pages_and_features.name: Macro Header (Top)
pages_and_features.description: Ticker tape showing Nifty 50, Bank Nifty, USD/INR, Crude. Uses react-fast-marquee. Very slow, monospace text.
pages_and_features.layout: Fixed top bar, h-10, border-b border-[#1F1F1F] flex items-center bg-[#050505]

pages_and_features.name: Dashboard Header & Command Scanner
pages_and_features.description: Header with title 'NSE Quant Engine' and a massive search input. 'Search NSE Universe...' with keyboard shortcut hint (Cmd+K).
pages_and_features.layout: Grid col-span-12 flex justify-between items-center py-6

pages_and_features.name: Market Confidence Score
pages_and_features.description: A single prominent widget showing a score (e.g., 78/100) and 'Risk-On' / 'Risk-Off' status. Use the generated abstract tactical grid as a faint background image.

pages_and_features.name: Regime Bento Box (Sprinter/Compounder/Reversal)
pages_and_features.description: 3 columns: Sprinters, Compounders, Reversals. Each is a dense list of tickers with recent % change. Minimalist representation.
pages_and_features.layout: col-span-12 md:col-span-8 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4

pages_and_features.name: Portfolio & Watchlist
pages_and_features.description: Table view with explicit 'Gainer', 'Stayer', 'Quitter' tags. Include columns: Ticker, Price, 1D %, Regime, Tag, Quality Score. Tags are visually sharp, uppercase.

media.hero_background_desc: Abstract tactical grid for the confidence score widget background (use with opacity-20)
media.user_avatar_desc: Professional user avatar for the top-right profile menu
media.texture_desc: Abstract dark mesh to overlay in the Deep Dive sheet header (use with mix-blend-overlay or opacity-10)

development_instructions.global_css: Ensure body background is #050505 and text is white. Hide scrollbars using tailwind utilities or custom css `::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }`. Use antialiasing. Import Chivo and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts.
development_instructions.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes like 'scanner-input', 'stock-row-{ticker}', 'deep-dive-close', 'regime-tab-{name}'.
